trades.reasoning: Score 90 with RSI 68.5 sitting in the ideal bullish momentum zone, confirmed MACD crossover, and price 6% above SMA-20 — Zoom's AI-enhanced platform is showing technical strength with room to run before reaching overbought territory.

Score 90 with the healthiest RSI at 59.3 among all top candidates — the most upside runway before overbought risk — combined with a confirmed MACD bullish crossover as Intel's turnaround thesis gains traction.

decisions.briefing: Markets closed mildly positive today — S&P +0.6% and NASDAQ +0.4% in a calm, directionless session. Our portfolio sits at +24.6% overall with 4 open slots and $843 in cash, so the priority was deploying intelligently rather than sitting idle. I selected ZM and INTC from the score-90 tier specifically because their RSI readings (68.5 and 59.3) sit in the healthy bullish momentum zone rather than the overbought zone (>70) that characterizes most of the other high-scoring candidates today.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities posted modest gains on Friday with the S&P 500 up 0.6% and the NASDAQ up 0.4%, reflecting a broadly neutral tape with no single dominant catalyst. Investor sentiment remained cautiously constructive as markets digested recent macroeconomic data and continued to price in the likelihood of a stable Fed policy path through mid-year. Tech and consumer discretionary names led quietly, while defensive sectors lagged in the low-volatility session.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股週五小幅收漲，標普500指數上升0.6%，納斯達克指數上升0.4%，整體走勢平淡，缺乏明確主導因素。市場情緒維持審慎樂觀，投資者持續消化近期宏觀數據，並就聯儲局年中維持政策穩定的預期進行定價。科技及非必需消費品板塊悄然領漲，防禦性板塊則相對落後，全日波幅收窄。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: The RSI (Relative Strength Index) measures how fast and how much a stock's price has moved recently, on a scale of 0–100. A reading between 55 and 70 is considered the 'bullish momentum zone' — the stock is trending upward with conviction but hasn't yet become 'overbought' (above 70), meaning there's still room for buyers to push it higher before a pullback becomes likely. Today we deliberately favored ZM (RSI 68.5) and INTC (RSI 59.3) over higher-scored stocks like LION (RSI 85.7) and DELL (RSI 86.9) precisely for this reason.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: RSI（相對強弱指數）衡量股價近期漲跌的速度與幅度，數值介於0至100之間。當RSI落在55至70區間，稱為「多頭動能區」——代表股票正以明確趨勢上行，但尚未進入「超買」狀態（高於70），意味著仍有上升空間，買盤尚未過熱。今日我們刻意選擇RSI為68.5的ZM與RSI為59.3的INTC，而非評分同樣高但RSI已達85.7的LION或86.9的DELL，正是基於此一邏輯，在動能與風險之間取得平衡。
